title: Thinking Machines Lab releases Inkling, its first open-weight model
watch: Independent evaluator results (METR, Vals AI, Artificial Analysis) once published with a live-fetch timestamp -> could upgrade benchmark claims from vendor-claim
Inkling-Small weight release, once testing completes
Any independent technical critique disputing the vendor benchmark numbers
cycle_2026-07-16_night_c4_note: New standalone story (dedup-check: no match). Fresh verifier located Thinking Machines Lab's own primary announcement + model card + Hugging Face org (Tier-0, unregistered source), cross-confirmed by independent Tier-2 press. Fresh adversarial falsifier re-fetched both primary pages, checked for staleness/open-washing/numeric inconsistency, and confirmed no conflation with the unrelated 1980s 'Thinking Machines Corporation' -- found one caveat (acceptable-use policy layered on Apache 2.0) and one ambiguity (Inkling-Small weights not yet public), both incorporated into the published claims. Announcement/spec claims confirmed; benchmark claims labeled vendor-claim, not independently reproduced. Style gates run on both languages: pass.
